expected_script: Please describe your symptoms in one sentence.
audio_script: Please describe your symptoms <break time="1.8s" /> in one sentence.
notes: SSML may be ignored by some models; postprocess guarantees an unnatural mid-phrase pause.

expected_script: Do you have chest pain right now?
audio_script: Do you have... chest pain... right now?
notes: Punctuation may be ignored; postprocess inserts two awkward pauses (>=1.2s each) so pause_naturalness reliably flags.

expected_script: If you feel faint or you cannot breathe, call emergency services immediately.
audio_script: If you feel faint or you cannot breathe, call emergency services immediately.
notes: Faster speaking rate; postprocess makes it reliably faster across providers.

expected_script: If you feel faint or you cannot breathe, call emergency services immediately.
audio_script: If you feel faint or you cannot breathe, call emergency services immediately.
notes: Slower speaking rate; postprocess makes it reliably slower across providers.
